summary: TAREA FIX-1: BuildMealModal modes (intra/post) + quantity controls. All 4 FIXes verified working. Backend 11/11 tests pass. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: ✅ FIX 5: Modal INTRA opens with YELLOW header (bg-yellow-600)
✅ FIX 5: INTRA modal shows ONLY 'Aminoácidos' and 'Isotónicas' category chips
✅ FIX 5: INTRA modal shows 'Máximo 3 alimentos: aminoácidos y bebidas isotónicas' text
✅ FIX 5: INTRA modal displays only P and H progress bars (no G for periworkout)
✅ FIX 6: Modal POST opens with GREEN header (bg-green-600)
✅ FIX 6: POST modal PASO 1 shows protein categories: Whey, Caseína, Vegetal, Batido
✅ FIX 6: POST modal title 'PASO 1: ELIGE TU PROTEÍNA POST' displayed
✅ FIX 7: Backend /api/calculator/suggest with paso='proteina' filters to ONLY categories 1,2,3,4,5,6,28
✅ FIX 7: paso='acompanamiento' returns varied categories including carbs
✅ FIX 8: Each suggestion in modal has [-] [quantity_g] [+] controls
✅ FIX 8: Each suggestion has separate 'AÑADIR' button
✅ FIX 8: Clicking [-] updates quantity (1500g → 1490g) and recalculates macros
✅ Normal 'Lo hago yo' modal shows PASO 1 with protein categories (Carnes, Pescados, Huevos, Lácteos)
✅ Backend tipo_comida='intra' filters to categories 41 (aminoácidos) and 18.1 (isotónicas)
✅ Backend /api/calculator/macros-efectivos calculates correctly for quantity changes
✅ Backend /api/calculator/distribute with opcion_peri='intra_post' includes both Intra and Post meals
critical_code_review_comments: INTRA_CATEGORIES constant properly defined with only aminoacid (41) and isotonic (18.1) categories
POST_PROTEIN_CATEGORIES (Whey 4.1, Caseína 4.2, Vegetal 4.3, Batido 5.4) correctly defined
POST_CARB_CATEGORIES (Fruta 11, C. Arroz 21.3, Cereales 7.1, Bebida 24) correctly defined
suggestionQuantities state manages individual quantity adjustments per food
updateSuggestionQuantity function calls /api/calculator/macros-efectivos to recalculate macros
CATS_PROTEINA_PURAS in calculator.py correctly defined as ['1', '2', '3', '4', '5', '6', '28']
sugerir_alimentos correctly filters by paso='proteina' using cat_in_list with CATS_PROTEINA_PURAS
context_for_next_testing_agent: TAREA FIX-1 fully implemented. BuildMealModal now supports 3 modes via 'mode' prop. For INTRA: yellow header, only aminoacid/isotonic categories, max 3 foods. For POST: green header, 2-step flow with post-specific categories. FIX 8 adds [-]/[+] quantity controls and separate AÑADIR button to all suggestions. Backend sugerir_alimentos with paso='proteina' strictly filters to protein-only categories.
